CreateLogStore.retention: Log store retention period, max 3650 days; -1 indicates permanent retention. Unit: days
CreateLogStore.tags: List of tags to create, see below for parameter format
CreateLogStore.tags.tagKey: Tag key, supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 1-65
CreateLogStore.tags.tagValue: Tag value, supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /., length 0-65
CreateLogStore.index.fulltext: Whether to enable full-text index, default false
CreateLogStore.index.caseSensitive: Whether full-text index is case-sensitive, default false
CreateLogStore.index.includeChinese: Whether full-text index includes Chinese characters, default false
CreateLogStore.index.separators: Custom delimiters for full-text index; uses default delimiters if not specified
CreateLogStore.index.fields: Field names and type definitions for keyword index
CreateLogStore.shardCount: Initial shard count for log store, default 1, max 50
CreateLogStore.disableShardAutoSplit: Whether to disable automatic shard splitting
